description: Black backpack with printed design, puma branding printed and Puma cat embroidered in frontTwo padded adjustable shoulder straps at the back and a short haul loopOne main zippered compartment with a padded laptop compartment with a velcro closureOne zippered compartment in front with an open compartment, two mesh pockets with elasticated openings on the sidesPadded back, adjustable click clock strap on the side on top, adjustable strap near the bottom on the sides and loop at the base in front
